flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Empire State University fell 42% between 2006 and 2009 (26.7% → 15.6%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Empire State University rose 14% between 2006 and 2009 ($4.6k → $5.2k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Empire State University rose 106% between 2021 and 2024 (13.8% → 28.4%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Empire State University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.6% → 0.0%).
